youve_looked_in_the_mirror_and_seen_your: You've looked in the mirror and seen your true worth. Carry these affirmations in your heart today.
the_way_you_speak_to_yourself_matters_mo: "The way you speak to yourself matters more than you know. This is a moment to be kind to the person who needs it most — you."
take_a_deep_breath_these_are_things_your: Take a deep breath. These are things your kindest self wants you to hear. Read each one slowly — out loud if you can.
i_am_not_my_anxious_thoughts_my_thoughts:
I am not my anxious thoughts.
My thoughts are not facts.
i_am_doing_the_best_i_can_with_what_i_ha:
I am doing the best I can
with what I have right now.
it_is_okay_to_not_have_all_the_answers_u:
It is okay to not have all the answers.
Uncertainty is part of life.
my_body_is_not_my_enemy_it_is_working_ha:
My body is not my enemy.
It is working hard to take care of me.
i_deserve_the_same_kindness_i_would_give:
I deserve the same kindness
I would give to someone I love.
this_worry_will_pass_it_always_does_i_ha:
This worry will pass. It always does.
I have survived every hard moment so far.
i_am_worthy_of_peace_and_calm_even_when_:
I am worthy of peace and calm,
even when things feel uncertain.
